rag_rules: Place component type assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Use visible identifiers and feature names in type-level contracts
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Assumptions and guarantees should reference valid component ports or visible variables
Use eq declarations for boolean range checks in contracts
Constants in AGREE must use valid scalar types: int, real, bool
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE syntax uses assume/guarantee labels with colons and semicolons
Component implementation annexes are for assignments and implementation-level bindings
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type annexes
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing properties
Implementation-level bindings in component type scopes
